title: Senior Financial Analyst - Equitas Small Finance Bank Ventures Solutions - Immediate Joiners Preferred
company: Equitas Small Finance Bank Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Equitas Small Finance Bank Ventures Solutions - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Equitas Small Finance Bank Ventures Solutions invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Financial Analyst at our Bengaluru location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Equitas Small Finance Bank Ventures Solutions:
Equitas Small Finance Bank Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Equitas Small Finance Bank Ventures Solutions!
